pi_items.source: setup_task.sh script explicitly creates a project with identifier 'core-engine'.
setup_task.sh script initializes a bare Git repository at this exact path.
Task description in task.json explicitly instructs the user to set the identifier to 'core-main'.
Redmine source code uses 'Repository::Git' as the ActiveRecord STI class name for Git repositories.

privileged_info_summary: The Redmine project identifier is 'core-engine'. A dummy bare Git repository is synthetically provisioned at the server path '/srv/git/core-engine.git'. The expected repository identifier to be configured by the agent is 'core-main', and the source control management (SCM) type is 'Repository::Git'.
